name: 24_different_thresholds_a_uses_three_b_uses_param
description: Branch 3 / Interaction: vwap_bleed_ticks_threshold=5 (param), confirming System A always uses VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS=3 (module constant) while System B uses the parameter. Both met; only A breaks at 3; B not yet at 5.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 3.0 >= cross 2.0 AND current_return -1.5 < safe_hwm 3.0 -> MET. new_vwap_ticks = 2+1 = 3. is_vwap_broken = (3 >= VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS(3)) TRUE -- pinned to the MODULE CONSTANT, not the parameter. System B: current_return -1.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 TRUE -> new_bleed_ticks = 2+1 = 3. bleed_broken = (3 >= vwap_bleed_ticks_threshold(5)) = FALSE -- uses the PARAMETER. Returns (3, 3, True, False). Catches an impl that confused the two thresholds (e.g., applied the parameter to System A, or hardcoded 3 in System B).
